content:
Stays quiet, rarely engages, but secretly does all the work.
Gains access to a hidden challenge with a potential game-changing reward.
If they fail their final challenge, they lose access to their highest XP unlock.


📜 How This Works in Practice:
✔ Students are not told their alignment explicitly—it is tracked based on their choices.
✔ At the end of the semester, their final challenge will subtly reflect their alignment.
✔ Some secret paths can only be unlocked by certain alignments.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 248 (chunk 248/555)
